Project IDFG_Properties "Q:\IFWIS\kjones\Requests\Krista Biorn\Boise River WMA Land\Boise River WMA Land.gdb\IDFG_Properties_Project" PROJCS['NAD_1983_Idaho_TM',GEOGCS['GCS_North_American_1983',DATUM['D_North_American_1983',SPHEROID['GRS_1980',6378137.0,298.257222101]],PRIMEM['Greenwich',0.0],UNIT['Degree',0.0174532925199433]],PROJECTION['Transverse_Mercator'],PARAMETER['False_Easting',2500000.0],PARAMETER['False_Northing',1200000.0],PARAMETER['Central_Meridian',-114.0],PARAMETER['Scale_Factor',0.9996],PARAMETER['Latitude_Of_Origin',42.0],UNIT['Meter',1.0]] WGS_1984_(ITRF00)_To_NAD_1983 PROJCS['WGS_1984_Web_Mercator_Auxiliary_Sphere',GEOGCS['GCS_WGS_1984',DATUM['D_WGS_1984',SPHEROID['WGS_1984',6378137.0,298.257223563]],PRIMEM['Greenwich',0.0],UNIT['Degree',0.0174532925199433]],PROJECTION['Mercator_Auxiliary_Sphere'],PARAMETER['False_Easting',0.0],PARAMETER['False_Northing',0.0],PARAMETER['Central_Meridian',0.0],PARAMETER['Standard_Parallel_1',0.0],PARAMETER['Auxiliary_Sphere_Type',0.0],UNIT['Meter',1.0]] NO_PRESERVE_SHAPE # NO_VERTICAL

idCitation.otherCitDet: If you discover any errors or have any questions regarding this dataset please contact Katey Jones, katey.jones@idfg.idaho.gov.

dataIdInfo.idAbs: In this dataset each parcel represents one record in the database. This dataset provides information about each parcel such as: acquistion number (ACNO), who the parcel was acquired from, who owns the parcel, what kind of parcel is it (ie. access site, WMA, WHA, easement), and how many acres it encompasses.Various private, state, and federal entities have entered into agreements with or sold lands to IDFG for the management of the state's fish and wildlife. Each property agreement/lease/deed/easement/permit in Bob Martin's (IDFG) Lands database was mapped based on their legal descriptions. Various layers were used to help digitize each area: township range section, geographic names, ITD roads, FS roads, hydrography, land ownership, county boundaries, etc. This shapefile was created by combining the mapping efforts of Pamela Bond and Angie Schmidt of IDFG and the Idaho Department of Lands. Much of the lands owned by IDFG or leased from IDL can be searched for viewed on the IDL website.
dataIdInfo.idPurp: This is the working dataset for the Idaho Fish and Game (IDFG) land ownership/management mapping project. It is a geospatial representation of all of the land records in the IDFG Lands Access Database.
dataIdInfo.idCredit: This dataset was created by IDFG.

LegConsts.othConsts: Idaho Fish and Game does not assume liability. No warranty expressed or implied is made by Idaho Fish and Game regarding the utility of the data on any other system, nor shall the act of distribution constitute any such warranty.

Idaho Fish and Game does not assume liability. No warranty expressed or implied is made by Idaho Fish and Game regarding the utility of the data on any other system, nor shall the act of distribution constitute any such warranty.

enttyp.enttypd: Geospatial data representation of IDFG Lands Access Database

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.

attr.attrdef: What IDFG uses the land for (ie. WMA, access site, hatchery, etc).
Each agreement/deed has an Acquistion Number - corrresponds to the IDFG Lands Database.
Acquired date for the land agreement.
How many acres are within the land parcel boundary from the legal description.
How many acres are within the land parcel boundary - calculated in ArcGIS.
